title: MazeRooms
body:
Have you ever wanted to explore infinite mazes generated procedurally?
Have you ever wanted to create procedurally generated mazes?

Then this mod is what you're searching!

Maze Rooms is a mod all about infinite mazes that can be customized to your hearth's desire.
To get started with custom mazes, check out Github

This mod is still a WIP, and as such it has plenty of bugs and lag issues, especially when generating the first rooms of a maze.
If you know about performance / maze algorithm, and want to help, feel free to make a PR!

Here are some images of the level that is built-in
Mods Used: MazeRooms, Sodium, Iris, GTCeu Modern
Shaders Used: Bliss v2.0.4 - defaul settings
![An image of The Built-In level](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc5d23ce777dbd02e0632c085954848de781b20c.png)![An image of The Built-In level, but with Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2f31ffa973dd5d10691137c3e8e54f5013373d4_0.webp)![An image of the Built-in level with shaders and an EBF from GTCeu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/654472c4e58b7ebb60deab744121089be71a0bfc_0.webp)
